entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `expression` TEXT NOT NULL, `result` TEXT NOT NULL, `timestamp` INTEGER NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_calculation_history_timestamp
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_calculation_history_timestamp` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`timestamp`)
